description: ClusterConfiguration is the Schema for the clusterconfigurations API

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

status.description: ClusterConfigurationStatus defines the observed state of ClusterConfiguration

clusterProfileResources.description:
ClusterProfileResources is the list of resources currently deployed in a Cluster due
to ClusterProfiles

items.description:
ClusterProfileResource keeps info on all of the resources deployed in this Cluster
due to a given ClusterProfile

Features.description:
Features contains the list of policies deployed in the Cluster because
of a given feature

charts.description: Charts is a list of helm charts deployed in the Cluster.

appVersion.description: AppVersion is the version of the app deployed in the Cluster.

chartVersion.description: ChartVersion is the version of the helm chart deployed in the Cluster.

icon.description: The URL to an icon file.

lastAppliedTime.description: LastAppliedTime identifies when this resource was last applied to the cluster.

namespace.description: Namespace where chart is deployed in the Cluster.

releaseName.description: ReleaseName name of the release deployed in the Cluster.

repoURL.description:
RepoURL URL of the repo containing the helm chart deployed
in the Cluster.

featureID.description: FeatureID is an indentifier of the feature whose status is reported

resources.description: Resources is a list of resources deployed in the Cluster.

group.description: Group of the resource deployed in the Cluster.

ignoreForConfigurationDrift.description:
IgnoreForConfigurationDrift indicates to not track resource
for configuration drift detection.
This field has a meaning only when mode is ContinuousWithDriftDetection

kind.description: Kind of the resource deployed in the Cluster.

lastAppliedTime.description: LastAppliedTime identifies when this resource was last applied to the cluster.

name.description: Name of the resource deployed in the Cluster.

namespace.description:
Namespace of the resource deployed in the Cluster.
Empty for resources scoped at cluster level.

owner.description: Owner is the list of ConfigMap/Secret containing this resource.

fieldPath.description:
If referring to a piece of an object instead of an entire object, this string
should contain a valid JSON/Go field access statement, such as desiredState.manifest.containers[2].
For example, if the object reference is to a container within a pod, this would take on a value like:
"spec.containers{name}" (where "name" refers to the name of the container that triggered
the event) or if no container name is specified "spec.containers[2]" (container with
index 2 in this pod). This syntax is chosen only to have some well-defined way of
referencing a part of an object.

uid.description:
UID of the referent.

version.description: Version of the resource deployed in the Cluster.

clusterProfileName.description: ProfileName is the name of the ClusterProfile matching the Cluster.

profileResources.description:

to Profiles

ProfileResource keeps info on all of the resources deployed in this Cluster
